Far Eastern Federal University, Russia

Atlas Mentor specializes in guiding students through their MBBS study abroad journey, particularly at Far Eastern Federal University, Russia, ensuring personalized and comprehensive support throughout the application and enrollment process.

  • By Altas Mentor
  • University In Russia
  • July 11, 2024

# Russia

Far Eastern Federal University, Russia

Far Eastern Federal University, founded in 1899 in Vladivostok, Eastern Russia, is known as Russia’s San Francisco and serves as the administrative center of Primorsky Krai.

It’s recognized as a top university by the Russian Ministry of Education and Science, enhancing Russia’s global university competitiveness.

The university’s Medical Center, staffed by over 200 specialized doctors, offers advanced medical care not only locally but also across Russia and abroad.

Far Eastern Federal University is the oldest university in Eastern Russia, uniting traditional academic disciplines and serving as a hub for international cooperation, particularly in the Asia-Pacific region.

It’s accredited by the WHO and Russia’s Ministry of Science and Higher Education, offering diverse medical programs and fostering scientific research.

With over 41,000 students, including 3,500 international students from 55 countries, Far Eastern Federal University is renowned for its robust medical education and modern facilities.

The university actively engages in global research projects, focusing on areas like oceanography, underwater robotics, and sustainable architecture.

Far Eastern Federal University maintains overseas offices in China, Japan, Vietnam, and India, welcoming international students and ensuring they receive excellent education and support.

Ranking of Far Eastern Federal University, Russia

Far Eastern Federal University ranks highly among medical universities in Russia. According to US News Global Universities, it is 18th in Russia, 534th in Europe, and 1441st globally. According to 4ICU, it ranks 30th in Russia and 1632nd worldwide.

Why Choose Far Eastern Federal University, Russia?

Considering studying MBBS at Far Eastern Federal University (FEFU)? Here’s why it’s a top choice for aspiring medical students:

  • Global Recognition: FEFU is recognized by NMC and WHO, ensuring graduates can practice medicine worldwide.

  • Innovative Learning: The university employs innovative teaching methods across all programs, enhancing educational outcomes.

  • State-of-the-Art Facilities: It provides excellent facilities for academic pursuits and recreational activities, creating a conducive learning environment.

  • International Community: FEFU fosters a diverse international student community, enriching cultural exchange and learning experiences.

  • Government Scholarships: Eligible students can benefit from government scholarships, easing the financial burden of medical education.

  • Secure Campus Life: The university offers secure and comfortable campus living with modern dormitories and amenities.

  • Integrated Approach: FEFU integrates education with research, sports, and creative activities, promoting holistic student development.

  • Worldwide Career Prospects: Graduates receive a globally recognized medical degree, opening doors to international career opportunities.

  • Affordable Education: With a commendable fee structure, FEFU provides cost-effective medical education without compromising quality.

  • Advanced Infrastructure: The university boasts world-class infrastructure including state-of-the-art laboratories and educational resources, ensuring high-quality practical learning experiences.

FEFU stands out as a prestigious institution in Russia, offering comprehensive development and a vibrant campus life to medical students..

Accreditation & Recognition of Far Eastern Federal University, Russia

Far Eastern Federal University (FEFU) stands as one of the largest and most esteemed medical universities in Russia, renowned for its comprehensive affiliations and recognitions by prominent medical councils worldwide:

  1. National Medical Commission of India (NMC): FEFU is recognized by the NMC, facilitating Indian students to pursue medical education in Russia and later practice in India upon clearing the requisite screening test.

  2. World Health Organization (WHO): Accredited by WHO, FEFU’s medical degrees are globally recognized, ensuring graduates meet international standards for medical practice.

  3. Ministry of Education and Science Russia: Endorsed by the Ministry of Education and Science of Russia, FEFU adheres to rigorous educational standards and regulations, ensuring quality education and accreditation.

FEFU’s affiliations with these prestigious councils underscore its commitment to delivering high-quality medical education and preparing students for successful careers in healthcare globally.

Eligibility Criteria for Far Eastern Federal University, Russia

The eligibility criteria for admission to Far Eastern Federal University’s MBBS program are as follows:

  1. Academic Qualifications: Applicants must have completed their 12th grade education with Biology as a compulsory subject.

  2. Minimum Aggregate: For the General Category, a minimum aggregate of 50% in Physics, Chemistry, and Biology (PCB) is required. For Reserve Categories, the minimum aggregate is also 50% in PCB, including practical exams.

  3. NEET Requirement: Applicants must qualify in the National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET), which is mandatory for Indian students seeking admission to medical programs abroad.

These criteria ensure that students possess the necessary academic background and have cleared the standardized entrance exam to pursue MBBS studies at Far Eastern Federal University.

Duration of MBBS at MBBS at Far Eastern Federal University, Russia

The MBBS program at Far Eastern Federal University spans over a duration of 6 years. The medium of instruction is predominantly in English, although Russian is also utilized. The curriculum includes a mandatory 1-year internship period, which provides practical, hands-on training in clinical settings. This internship period is crucial for students to apply their theoretical knowledge in real-world medical practices, ensuring they are well-prepared for their professional careers upon graduation.

Documents Required Admission For MBBS at Far Eastern Federal University, Russia

During the MBBS admission process at Far Eastern Federal University, Indian students are required to submit the following documents:

  1. Class 10th Pass Certificate and Mark Sheet: Documenting completion of secondary education.

  2. Class 12th Pass Certificate and Mark Sheet: Showing successful completion of higher secondary education with required subjects.

  3. NEET Score Card: Proof of qualifying the National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET), mandatory for Indian medical aspirants.

  4. Birth Certificate: Providing official proof of date and place of birth.

  5. Valid Passport: Ensuring identification and nationality verification.

  6. Passport-Size Photographs: Recent photographs meeting specified dimensions.

  7. Medical Test Report: Including a negative HIV report, confirming the applicant’s health status.

These documents are essential for completing the admission process at Far Eastern Federal University, ensuring that all necessary requirements are met for enrollment into the MBBS program.

Faculties at Far Eastern Federal University, Russia

Far Eastern Federal University (FEFU) in Russia boasts diverse faculties that cater to a wide range of disciplines within the medical field:

  1. Faculty of General Medicine: Offers comprehensive education in medicine, covering foundational principles and advanced medical practices.

  2. Faculty of Dentistry/Stomatology: Focuses on dental health, equipping students with skills in oral health care and treatment.

  3. Faculty of Paediatrics: Specializes in pediatric medicine, addressing healthcare needs specific to children and adolescents.

  4. Faculty of Higher Nursing Education: Provides advanced training in nursing practices, emphasizing critical care and patient management.

  5. Faculty of Training and Internship: Supports students during their internship period, facilitating practical experience in various medical specialties.

Each faculty at FEFU is dedicated to fostering excellence in education and research, preparing students to meet the evolving challenges of the healthcare industry with specialized knowledge and skills.

Advantages Of Studying MBBS At Far Eastern Federal University, Russia

Studying MBBS at Far Eastern Federal University provides a range of benefits that include global recognition, innovative learning methods, excellent facilities, a diverse international environment, government scholarships, and a well-integrated approach to education and activities.

  • Global Recognition: Recognized and approved by NMC and WHO, enabling graduates to practice medicine worldwide.

  • Innovative Learning: Utilizes an innovative teaching approach across all programs.

  • State-of-the-Art Facilities: Provides excellent facilities for both academic studies and recreational activities.

  • Diverse International Environment: Fosters a diverse student body from around the globe, enriching cultural exchange and learning experiences.

  • Government Scholarships and Campus Facilities: Offers government scholarships for medical students and provides comfortable dormitories in a secure campus environment.

  • Integration of Education and Activities: Integrates education with research, sports, and creative pursuits, promoting holistic development.

  • Advanced Development Center: Supported by an advanced development center for enhanced study resources.

  • Global Career Opportunities: FEFU’s medical degree is globally recognized, facilitating practice in any country upon completion.

  • Affordable Education: Provides cost-effective medical education with a commendable fee structure.

  • Prestigious Infrastructure and Faculty: Boasts prestigious infrastructure, including state-of-the-art laboratories and educational equipment, alongside highly qualified faculty offering excellent education.

Hostel And Accommodation At Far Eastern Federal University, Russia

Far Eastern Federal University Hostel provides convenient accommodation options for students, located in a picturesque setting close to the airport. It offers a variety of rooms equipped with essential amenities such as beds, cupboards, fans, and air conditioning. The hostel features:

  • Presidential Suites: Luxurious accommodations for students.
  • Standard Rooms: Comfortable living spaces for students.
  • Fully Furnished Rooms: Includes all necessary furniture and amenities.
  • Separate Wings: Segregated areas for male and female students.
  • Kitchen Facilities: Each floor is equipped with a kitchen and necessary cooking equipment for students to prepare their meals.
  • Room Options: Students can choose between double rooms, suites for three, or suites for four, ensuring comfort and convenience during their stay.

Far Eastern Federal University Hostel aims to provide a conducive environment where students can study, relax, and socialize with their peers.

Student benefits at Far Eastern Federal University, Russia

Student life at Far Eastern Federal University is vibrant and enriching, offering top-notch educational facilities and a supportive environment:

  1. Campus Facilities: The university provides nutritious meals and clean drinking water. For those who prefer cooking their own food, kitchen facilities are available on campus.

  2. Learning Environment: The campus offers a peaceful and conducive atmosphere for learning, equipped with all essential academic resources and equipment.

  3. Cultural and Social Activities: Regular cultural events and various recreational activities are organized, encouraging student interaction, participation, and enjoyment alongside academic pursuits.

  4. Academic Infrastructure: FEFU boasts the largest academic campus, facilitating comprehensive clinical programs for medical students. It includes classrooms, a library, sports areas, laboratories, and other essential facilities.

  5. Safety and Security: The university prioritizes the safety of its international students, ensuring a secure campus environment monitored by dedicated security personnel.

Far Eastern Federal University not only focuses on academic excellence but also strives to enhance the overall student experience through diverse activities and a supportive infrastructure conducive to learning and personal growth.
